Author: GitHub
Description:
GitHub Copilot cloud agent on github.com just got a lot more flexible. You can now it use it to research, plan, and make code changes without needing to open a pull request first. Copilot now gives you more flexibility in how and when you move your work forward by letting you decide when you want a pull request to be created for a code change.

Learn more at https://gh.io/copilotcloudagent

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotCloudAgent #AI

Title: Put GitHub Copilot cloud agent to work - Research, plan and code
